label: Arb Stream
description: Live prediction market arb opportunities with decay bars, expected value, and one-click execute.

0.5.note: ARB_THRESHOLD_OPTIONS moved inline from lib/mocks/fixtures/sports-fixtures — fixed in prior pass.

0.7.note: Empty state: Card with Clock icon and 'No arbs above N% threshold'.

1.1.note: Reads activeArbs, arbNewIds, arbThreshold, arbMarketTypeFilter, executeArb via usePredictionsData().

1.3.note: Arb opportunities are market-level, cross-venue — not org-scoped by design.

1.4.note: clientIds gap acknowledged — arb stream is market-level, not client-scoped.

1.5.note: Strategy filter N/A — arb stream is venue-level, not strategy-scoped.

3.1.note: Live ✓: arb stream active. Paper ✓: stream shown (no real orders). Batch ✓: arb interval disabled via isBatch guard.

3.2.note: Context reads isBatch from useExecutionMode(); 8s arb interval stops when isBatch=true.

3.5.note: Paper: stream visible, Execute button should show simulated flag — human verify.

3.6.note: setInterval in predictions-data-context.tsx returns early when isBatch=true — arb generation stops in batch mode.

l3.notes: Agent prep complete. 3.3 — Execute button behavior in batch; 3.4 — visual batch indicator. Human verify.

4.1.note: Threshold buttons and type filters all wired to context setters. Execute button wired to executeArb(arbId).

l4.notes: Human: 4.3 — verify min arb threshold filter works; 4.4 — Execute produces toast and moves arb to closed list; 4.8 — scroll in stream.

5.1.note: Primary widget for PRED_POLY_ARB_SCE_1M (Polymarket/Kalshi cross-venue arb). Also relevant to PRED_BTC_CEFI_ARB_SCE_5M.

l5.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: end-to-end arb execution flow — detect arb → review legs → Execute → confirm positions created.

7.1.note: text-rose-400 replaced with text-destructive. bg-[#4ade80]/text-[#4ade80] replaced with bg-[var(--pnl-positive)]/text-[var(--pnl-positive)] in live indicator.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks/ imports. ARB_THRESHOLD_OPTIONS is a UI constant defined inline.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

8.3.note: Uses Card, CardContent, Button (via PredActiveArbCard) from components/ui/.

8.4.note: Agent: no bare img/input/div-onClick in widget. Threshold buttons are <button> elements — OK. Human: keyboard walk.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred. Human: 8.4 keyboard + 8.5 resize at minW=4.

keepSeparate.rationale: Active arbs (stream) and closed arbs (history) are logically separate; keeping them separate allows each to have appropriate layout density.

relationships.notes: Executing an arb moves it from active to closed (picked up by pred-arb-closed via shared context state).

dataContract.notes: Production: WebSocket push from arb detection service. 8s poll simulated in mock. Decay bar uses client-side timer.

gaps: Only 2-leg arbs supported; N-leg arbitrage not modeled
Arb decay timer is client-side only — no server-side expiry sync
coverage.notes: Filters: football/crypto/tradfi market types; min arb percentage threshold.

findings.description: Widget imported ARB_THRESHOLD_OPTIONS from lib/mocks/fixtures/sports-fixtures.ts — fixed in prior pass.
findings.fix: ARB_THRESHOLD_OPTIONS moved inline as UI-only const.

findings.description: pred-arb-stream-widget.tsx — No loading or error guard initially.
pred-arb-stream-widget.tsx:94-97 — bg-[#4ade80]/text-[#4ade80] hardcoded in live indicator

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: pred-arb-stream-widget.tsx — text-[11px] and text-[10px] arbitrary font sizes
findings.fix: Applied text-caption (11px, existing) and text-micro (10px, new token) from globals.css (2026-04-21).

findings.description: pred-arb-ui.tsx:87 (PredActiveArbCard, renders inside pred-arb-stream) — bg-[#0d140d] hardcoded hex background on success-tinted card.
findings.fix: Replaced with bg-[var(--pnl-positive)]/5 so the card tint tracks the pnl-positive token.

findings.description: pred-arb-ui.tsx PredActiveArbCard Execute button and context.executeArb do not check scope.mode === 'batch'. A user in batch mode can still click Execute and a mock order is placed.
findings.deferReason: Cross-widget fix — batch-mode gating on prediction-market trade actions also applies to pred-trade-panel (TradePanelInner lives in components/trading/predictions/). Better to gate once in context.placeTrade/executeArb in a dedicated pass than to patch each consumer.
